content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
428 J Street • Suite 620 • Sacramento, CA 95814-2329
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886

September 18, 2007

Rikki M. Bradley
CalHome Program
1800 Third Street, Room 390-2
Sacramento, CA 95814

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-07-155

Dear Ms. Bradley:

This correspondence is written confirmation that on September 13, 2007, you withdrew your September 10, 2007, request for advice under the provisions of the Political Reform Act.¹ Consequently, we will prepare no response.

If you have other questions on this matter, please contact me at (916) 322-5660.

Sincerely,

Scott Hallabrin
General Counsel

By: Brian G. Lau
Counsel, Legal Division

BGL:jgl

_______________

¹ The Political Reform Act is contained in Government Code Sections 81000 through 91014. All statutory references are to the Government Code, unless otherwise indicated. The regulations of the Fair Political Practices Commission are contained in Sections 18110 through 18997 of Title 2 of the California Code of Regulations. All regulatory references are to Title 2, Division 6 of the California Code of Regulations, unless otherwise indicated.

sections.parsing_notes: No section headers found; LLM: This is a withdrawal letter from FPPC confirming withdrawal of a request for advice. No substantive question or conclusion sections exist. The document confirms the withdrawal date (September 13, 2007) and the original request date (September 10, 2007).
